name: Madolche Mini Meowcaroons
name_jp: ミニャーマドルチェ・ニャカロン
desc:
2+ Effect Monsters, including a "Madolche" monster
If this card is Link Summoned: You can add 1 "Madolche" card from your Deck to your hand. You can target 1 monster in your GY; Special Summon 1 "Madolche" monster from your hand, and if you do, shuffle that target into the Deck, also you cannot activate monster effects for the rest of this turn, except "Madolche" monsters. You can only use each effect of "Madolche Mini Meowcaroons" once per turn.
mnst_eff:

You can target 1 monster in your GY; Special Summon 1 "Madolche" monster from your hand, and if you do, shuffle that target into the Deck, also you cannot activate monster effects for the rest of this turn, except "Madolche" monsters. You can only use each effect of "Madolche Mini Meowcaroons" once per turn.
eff:
2+ Effect Monsters, including a "Madolche" monster
If this card is Link Summoned: You can add 1 "Madolche" card from your Deck to your hand. You can target 1 monster in your GY; Special Summon 1 "Madolche" monster from your hand, and if you do, shuffle that target into the Deck, also you cannot activate monster effects for the rest of this turn, except "Madolche" monsters. You can only use each effect of "Madolche Mini Meowcaroons" once per turn.

action: Returns from your Graveyard to your Deck
mst: Prevents activation of your Effect Monsters
summoning: Requires Effect Monsters as Link Materials
